prompt: An explorer enters an ancient floating city at sunrise and uncovers a hidden archive beneath the wind bridges.

scenes.title: Arrival Above the Clouds
scenes.summary: Lead arrives at the floating city and meets the Archivist at the first bridge tower.
dialogue_beats: Lead: I crossed three storms to find this city.
Archivist: Then you already know the sky does not forgive the impatient.
Lead: I am not here to conquer it. I am here to understand it.
visual_cues: Wide aerial reveal of floating towers at sunrise
Two-shot on bridge with wind and drifting cloth
Close-up on Lead listening with resolve

scenes.title: The Wind Archive
scenes.summary: Inside the archive, the pair decode a map of memory echoes hidden in glass panels.
dialogue_beats: Archivist: Every panel remembers a choice someone feared to make.
Lead: Then show me the choice that broke this city.
Archivist: Careful. Truth without context is another kind of ruin.
visual_cues: Tracking shot through glowing library corridor
Close-up on Archivist hand over etched symbols

scenes.title: Bridge of Echoes
scenes.summary: At dusk, Lead chooses to reactivate the bridge while Archivist guides the sequence.
dialogue_beats: Lead: If we wait, the lower districts vanish by morning.
Archivist: Then act with precision, not panic.
Lead: On your mark. I trust your count.
visual_cues: Wide shot of fractured bridge over cloud canyon
Medium action shot as runes ignite sequentially
Emotional close-up as city lights return
